findings.problem: The quoted relapse line creates a timeline contradiction inside a chapter whose premise is documentary precision: it says the November 22 drink happened after confronting Gloria with freight logs and a death certificate, but those records enter the story later. The contradiction weakens causal trust at the exact point the chapter argues for method over myth.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the relapse sentence at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:68 so the trigger matches established chronology (relapse before certified-record confrontation), then align downstream relapse framing at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:118 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:209 so no line implies she had the death certificate/logs on November 22.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised passages at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:68 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:209 no longer state or imply that the November 22 drink followed possession of the death certificate/freight logs; FAIL if that sequence remains possible on a plain reading.

findings.problem: Luis's exchange stacks multiple polished maxims/transit parables in one run, pushing him toward aphoristic sponsor-guru texture instead of his style-bible target (plainspoken, unsentimental, practical sequencing). The accumulation reads like token-list overuse rather than pressure-specific speech.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:58, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:74, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:90, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:100, keep one transit metaphor and rewrite the other slogan lines into concrete sponsor prompts tied to immediate material (which sentence is unsupported, what fact is missing, what call must be made tonight). Prioritize clipped working-class plain speech over quotable lines.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised Luis dialogue at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:58, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:74, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:90, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:100 contains no more than one figurative transit-parable line and includes at least three concrete accountability prompts anchored to the pages in hand; FAIL if the exchange still reads primarily as stacked aphorisms.

findings.problem: A recurring stress-regulation construction appears more than twice: Marisol repeatedly inflicts pain/numbing (scar pressure, cheek bite, cold-water shock) to mark anxiety. The repeated beat stops reading as chosen motif and starts reading as default prose autopilot.
findings.rewrite_direction: Keep one high-impact bodily self-regulation beat and vary the others across snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:141, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:163, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:198 using distinct interior/exterior responses (breath counting, movement, task substitution, or relational action) so each pressure moment has different texture.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, across snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:141, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:163, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:198, no more than one beat uses deliberate pain/numbing as the control mechanism; FAIL if two or more still rely on the same pain-reset move.

findings.problem: The Cora paragraph jumps into later-acquired wardrobe/habit details during an urgent first phone call, creating an avoidable narrative-distance wobble away from close-third immediacy while the scene clock is tightening.
findings.rewrite_direction: Tighten snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:153 to observations Marisol can plausibly register in-call, or explicitly frame the aside as retrospective memory with a clear temporal cue. Keep urgent-call momentum continuous into snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:155 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:157.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:153 contains only present-call perceivable detail (or an explicitly marked retrospective frame) and the transition into snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:155 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:157 reads as uninterrupted urgency; FAIL if unexplained future biographical detail still interrupts the call.

summary: Chapter 13 lands its mandated beats and keeps strong scene-level consequence, but unresolved continuity causality plus dialogue/prose formula drift keep it below pass-level craft rigor for this review stage.
